case_title: AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC. VS. JIM SOTTILE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOTTILE, JIM SOTTILE, LORI THEATRE DISTRCIT TOWNHOMES OWNER'S ASSOCIATION $1,555.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,672.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH NAMED DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-29-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD THEATRE DISTRICT TOWNHOMES OWNER'S ASSOCIATION AS DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE AMENDED CLAIM ON NEW DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED AUG-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOTTILE, JIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,430.00 FILED BY AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOTTILE, JIM SOTTILE, LORI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JUL-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOTTILE, LORI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOTTILE, JIM SOTTILE, LORI THEATRE DISTRCIT TOWNHOMES OWNER'S ASSOCIATION
